creator: ootput@gmail.com
text:
After the update to 11.8.16 a few things don't work as in the previous release:

- the play/stop/previous/next buttons don't have icons, especially
  noticeable for play, since it doesn't change between play/pause
  anymore. Repeated entries (per button) in logs show: 
    "(gmpc:52244): Gtk-WARNING **: Attempting to add a widget with type GtkImage to a GtkButton, but as a GtkBin subclass a GtkButton can only contain one widget at a time; it already contains a widget of type GtkLabel"

- changing the album cover metadata selector doesn't update instantly,
  only after restarting

- the lyrics display has a fixed width, which is very small and often
  wraps lines though there would be enough space for them

How-To-Repeat: Launch gmpc frontend, and observe album cover metadata or lyrics modules.
